contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 30
- Description: Deferred → Manager Follow-up auto-flip cron + required Follow Up Date + Gmail links
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/198
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/266
  
  Details:
  Two PRs to wire up an automatic "Deferred / Revisit later" → "Manager Follow-up" flow on Hit List, plus clickable Gmail links from the per-store editor:
  
  dapp (PR #198):
  - store_interaction_history.html now blocks save when operator selects Status = "Deferred / Revisit later" without setting Follow Up Date (and rejects past-dated entries to surface typos). The Follow Up Date is the resurface trigger for the GAS cron.
  - gmail_message_id (and gmail_thread_id) cells in the timeline now render as clickable links to https://mail.google.com/mail/u/0/#all/<id>. Gmail's web app resolves the message-id to the thread, so an operator can click straight to the conversation in their inbox without copy-pasting search queries.
  
  tokenomics (PR #266):
  - New google_app_scripts/find_nearby_stores/process_deferred_auto_flip.gs reference file. Implements processDeferredAutoFlip() — daily scanner that finds Deferred rows whose Follow Up Date <= today, flips Status to "Manager Follow-up", and appends a DApp Remarks row attributing the change to "auto-flip-deferred".
  - Self-contained — does not depend on updateStoreStatus / logDappSubmission_ in Code.js (gitignored per the clasp-mirror policy). Reads + writes Hit List and DApp Remarks directly with the same column layout Code.js uses.
  - installDeferredAutoFlipTrigger() helper for one-time setup; uninstallDeferredAutoFlipTrigger() for migrations.
  - No rate limit per Gary 2026-04-30: if a row is re-Deferred and the new date passes, it flips again. Each flip writes a new DApp Remarks row.
  
  Why this design:
  - Required Follow Up Date in the editor IS the prerequisite for the cron — without that validation, Deferred rows could be saved with a blank revisit date and would never resurface.
  - Manager Follow-up was Gary's choice (no new enum value); the audit trail comes from the DApp Remarks Submitted By = "auto-flip-deferred" filter.
  - Daily cron at 03:00 script-timezone is the simplest possible mechanism. No Edgar round-trip, no Telegram event, no signature — just a sheet sweep + atomic writes.
  
  Operator setup (one-time, find_nearby_stores Apps Script project):
  1. clasp pull
  2. clasp push
  3. Run installDeferredAutoFlipTrigger from the editor's function dropdown.
  
  Pull requests:
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/dapp/pull/198
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/tokenomics/pull/266
- Contributor(s): Garyjob <garyjob@gmail.com>
- TDG Issued: 50.00
- Attached Filename: N/A
- Destination Contribution File Location: N/A
